name: parametric xIELU activation (Apertus non-gated FFN)

op.signature: out[...,K] = xIELU(x[...,K]; alpha_p, alpha_n, beta, eps), fp32 nonlinearity

preconditions: x is contiguous row-major; alpha_p, alpha_n are 1-element tensors on x's device
alpha_p, alpha_n are the raw LOG-SPACE params (checkpoint form): effective scales are softplus(alpha_p) and beta + softplus(alpha_n)
beta = 0.5, eps = -1e-6 (Apertus defaults); passed as python scalars, not tensors

numerics.notes: Parametric piecewise activation (xIELU, arXiv:2411.13010). softplus of the learned log-space params + the expm1/min nonlinearity are evaluated in promoted (fp32) precision, cast to the out dtype; the only divergence vs an fp32 oracle is that final cast (same bar as the silu_and_mul / gelu_and_mul family, issue #67). Bit-identical to transformers.XIELUActivation (the HF/vLLM math).
